CustomField.description: Legacy field from the original Recurring Donations model. Determines whether the donation is open-ended, fixed-length, or closed. In Enhanced Recurring Donations, use the Recurring Type and Status fields instead.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Open: ongoing donations with no end date. None: fixed-length with a set number of installments. Closed: no longer active. For Enhanced Recurring Donations, use Recurring Type and Status instead.
CustomField.label: Open Ended Status
